title: At Least 23 Killed in Nigeria as Insurgent Attacks Go On Despite U.S. Help
summary_full: A teaching hospital and two markets in the city of Maiduguri were hit in what a military spokesman said were suicide bombings by Boko Haram.
summary_public: A teaching hospital and two markets in the city of Maiduguri were hit in what a military spokesman said were suicide bombings by Boko Haram.
